codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: done-step rendering is split into verified/pending/failed branches, CTA mounting is reactively gated via verification state/verification_ok, manual link flow routes to pending, and branch-specific action/button contracts are enforced. Added tests in client/tests/test_tui.py cover branch rendering, CTA visibility toggles, failed-branch button contract, manual-to-pending routing, and rapid toggles.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 5557e8e diff for honest-end-state-branches. No blocking or non-blocking issues found for this feature scope; report status is pass.
